name: continuum-core
description: Your whole desktop context — everything you've seen, read, typed, and heard — as a single MCP your agent can use to understand you and how you work. Open source, local-first, on-device.

scripts.test: node daemon/stage2/segmenter.test.mjs && node daemon/stage3/index.test.mjs && node daemon/stage4/distill.test.mjs && node daemon/pipeline.test.mjs && CONTINUUM_DATA=$(mktemp -d) node daemon/store.test.mjs && node daemon/eval/eval.test.mjs && node daemon/stage2/fusion.test.mjs && node daemon/stage4/label.test.mjs && node daemon/stage6/diff.test.mjs && node daemon/stage1/vision.test.mjs && node daemon/stage2/novelty.test.mjs && node daemon/stage2/typing.test.mjs && node daemon/stage1/chrome.test.mjs && node daemon/stage2/cap.test.mjs && node daemon/mcp.test.mjs && CONTINUUM_DATA=$(mktemp -d) node daemon/preferences.test.mjs && node daemon/eval/measure.test.mjs && CONTINUUM_DATA=$(mktemp -d) node daemon/clean.test.mjs

author: Nikhil Kagita
